author: Agent D
scope: Every source file currently in play for BCP Dev v0.2 allocation / accounting tools. Drives staleness warnings. Read by `check_allocation_readiness`, `validate_crosswalk_readiness`, and any tool that joins to one of these files.
purpose: Truth layer for 'what file currently feeds what.' If a tool depends on a file listed here and the file's last_modified is older than its freshness threshold, the tool should warn before producing output.

freshness_caveat_legend.current: File represents the latest known snapshot from the source system. Safe to use.
freshness_caveat_legend.monthly_close_dependent: Will be re-issued at month-end close. Snapshots between closes may be partial.
freshness_caveat_legend.ad_hoc_pull: Pulled manually; no fixed cadence. Use last_modified as the trustworthy timestamp.
freshness_caveat_legend.frozen_pre_2018: Pre-2018 historical data. Not refreshed. Treat as immutable reference.
freshness_caveat_legend.originals_not_recovered: JSON state authored from briefing; .docx/.pptx originals not yet placed in data/raw/process_docs/. Pending recovery.
freshness_caveat_legend.scope_brief_referenced_not_present: Scope brief named this file (e.g., 'BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31.CSV', 'JCS BCPD.xlsm', 'JCS ASD.xlsm', 'Flagship_Allocation_Workbook 08.xlsm'); the literal file is not in the working tree. The closest in-repo proxy is recorded under `proxy_for`.

files.path: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Per-Lot Output.csv
files.notes: Canonical shape of the per-lot output table. 15 columns: Community, Phase, Job Id, Lot Type, Lots, Direct Budget (LandDev), Direct Budget Override, Effective Direct Budget, Indirect Allocated, Land Allocated, Total Cost, Direct/Lot, Indirect/Lot, Land/Lot, Total/Lot.

files.path: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Allocation Engine.csv
files.notes: Sales-basis-percentage and pool-allocation math, by community.

files.path: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Lot Mix & Pricing.csv
files.notes: Lot counts (LotData vs Manual Input) tie-out and projected sales prices. Drives Sales Basis %.

files.path: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Indirect & Land Pools.csv
files.notes: Per-community INDIRECT and LAND pools. Type column drives CW-12 cost-pool mapping.
Sheet-by-sheet instruction text. Reference only.
Parkway Fields phase-summary tab. Source for Cost of water mapping (CW-12) and B-suffix lot conventions referenced in CW-08.
Mirror of LH JCSList for the same period; covers all BCPD-in-scope entities (BCPDev / BCPBL / ASD / BCPI). 59 rows.
Adjustment journal entries that the workbook applies on top of LandDev-system budgets. Inspect during reconciliation.
Lomond Heights phase-summary tab. BCPBL DevCo. Workbook calls the community 'Ben Lomond' — see CW-03 drift.

files.source_system_role: Per-community PLJ (Profit & Loss by Job) export
files.proxy_for: BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31.CSV (named in scope brief; not in working tree)
monitored_field_sources: PLJ column headers (per-phase) — see CW-05, CW-09
files.notes: Profit & Loss by Job export, Harmony community. Columns are phase-grain (e.g., 'Harmony A4.1', 'Harmony B1', 'Harmony Multi-Family 1', 'Harmony Phase A Plat 4'). The 'BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31.CSV' named in the scope brief is the analogous BCPDev-wide export — confirm with source-owner whether this LH file is the relevant proxy or whether a separate BCPDev PLJ should be staged.

files.source_system_role: QBD job-cost-summary list (LH version, BCPDev/BCPBL/ASD/BCPI scope)
files.proxy_for: JCS BCPD.xlsm + JCS ASD.xlsm (named in scope brief; not in working tree)
files.notes: 59-row workbook tab. Columns: Tab, Project, Phase, QB Job, Orig Budget, LAND ACQUISITION, INTEREST EXPENSE, Adj Budget, ITD Actuals. Covers BCPDev, BCPBL, ASD, BCPI rows. 'Mapping needed' literal appears in Phase / QB Job cells for rows that have not yet been mapped — these are CW-05 targets for resolution.
Balance-sheet-by-job slice. Feeds inventory account reconciliation.
BCPBL DevCo summary block.

Master per-lot record with date fields HorzMDA, HorzPrelimPlat, HorzFinalPlat, HorzStart, HorzEnd, HorzRecord, HorzContract, HorzSale, VertPurchase, VertStart, VertCO, VertSale, VertClose. Source of truth for lot-level lifecycle. 26 columns.

QBD ledger detail in 'header-rows-then-detail' shape. Columns: Type, Date, Num, Name, Memo, Class, Clr, Split, Debit, Credit, Balance. Section headers like '111-120 · Salem Fields PID 2024A-2 Fund' carry account code + label — feed CW-10.
Active 16-community list with HorzCustomer field. Drives canonical community name corroboration (docs/crosswalk_plan.md §3).
38-column DataRails export. Has known 2.16x row-multiplication dedup at fetch time (DataRailsConnector). Carries no phase grain for BCPD scope per docs/crosswalk_plan.md §4.

files.source_system_role: ClickUp task export (lifecycle source of truth)
files.notes: Primary source for lifecycle events. Columns: id, top_level_parent_id, name, status, date_created, date_updated, date_closed, date_done, archived, creator_username, assignee_username, tag_name, priority, due_date, start_date, points, time_estimate, walk_date, walk_agent, projected_close_date, subdivision, lot_num, cancelled_date, cancelled, close_date, closed, actual_c_of_o, C_of_O, sold_date, sold, phase, lot_type. v0.2 is file-based; v0.3 will add a live connector (per docs/bcp_dev_process_ontology_v1.md).
Seed of project/source-system/concept aliases. v0.2 crosswalks (this manifest) reference it but supersede it for accounting/allocation routing.
Authored 2026-05-11 by Agent C from briefing. Original UCH_Home_DevCos_GL_Structure_Process_Guide_v4.docx not yet in data/raw/process_docs/.
Authored 2026-05-11 by Agent C. Originals: UCH_Home_DevCos_ClickUp_Lifecycle_Tracking_Guide_v2.docx + UCH_Land_Lifecycle_Walkthrough_v2.pptx. Not yet in data/raw/process_docs/.
Defines land_at_mda, water_by_letter, direct_per_phase, indirect_community, warranty_at_sale; holds range_row_unratified.
Lot-level (project, phase, lot) → canonical_lot_id from v2.1. v0.2 tools should rely on the rules in CW-08, not row-by-row mappings, but this is the join table when needed.
